match_story.headline: Pipeline test match
match_story.summary: Test run with 43 rallies across 1 games.

shot_choice_issues.description: Passive lifts/clears when net play available

short.tier_summary: Short rallies (≤5 shots): 8 won, 11 lost out of 19. Biggest differentiator: rally ending.

medium.tier_summary: Medium rallies (6-12 shots): 6 won, 6 lost out of 12. Biggest differentiator: rally ending.

long.tier_summary: Long rallies (13+ shots): 3 won, 8 lost out of 11. Biggest differentiator: rally ending.

rally_blueprints.description: Opponent reset shots dominant approach in long rallies: reset_shots (47%), net_shots (15%), placement_shots (13%)
Opponent reset shots dominant approach in short rallies: reset_shots (50%), serve_shots (25%), pressure_shots (12%)

key_differentiators.summary: Short rallies (≤5 shots): 8 won, 11 lost out of 19. Biggest differentiator: rally ending.
Medium rallies (6-12 shots): 6 won, 6 lost out of 12. Biggest differentiator: rally ending.
Long rallies (13+ shots): 3 won, 8 lost out of 11. Biggest differentiator: rally ending.

tempo_control.control_narrative: Tempo is closely contested (0% vs 0%). Player dominates with none identified; loses tempo on none identified.

short.tier_summary: Short rallies (≤5 shots): 11 won, 9 lost out of 20. Biggest differentiator: rally ending.

winning_reasons.narrative: Strong shot quality: avg effectiveness 100 vs 80 in lost rallies
Strong attacking initiative: attacking 0% vs 0% in lost rallies

medium.tier_summary: Medium rallies (6-12 shots): 6 won, 6 lost out of 12. Biggest differentiator: rally ending.

losing_reasons.narrative: Rally ending: opponent gifted winner (weak preceding shot)

long.tier_summary: Long rallies (13+ shots): 8 won, 3 lost out of 11. Biggest differentiator: rally ending.

rally_blueprints.description: Opponent reset shots dominant approach in medium rallies: reset_shots (44%), pressure_shots (22%), unknown (11%)

Medium rallies (6-12 shots): 6 won, 6 lost out of 12. Biggest differentiator: rally ending.
Long rallies (13+ shots): 8 won, 3 lost out of 11. Biggest differentiator: rally ending.

tempo_control.control_narrative: Tempo is closely contested (0% vs 0%). Player dominates with none identified; loses tempo on none identified.

noteworthy_findings.observation: Effectiveness peaks in Pre Interval (61.2) and drops in Start (50.8)
noteworthy_findings.why: A 10 point effectiveness gap between scoring phases suggests inconsistency under different game situations.

noteworthy_findings.observation: Plays better when trailing (57.8) than when leading (51.6)
noteworthy_findings.why: May relax when ahead, or performs better under pressure to catch up.
